## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Describe your test approach -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the TypeScript strict mode standards of this project
- [ ] I have written tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] `tsc --noEmit` passes with no errors (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] 100% statement/line coverage is maintained
- [ ] I have not used `any`, `@ts-ignore`, or `@ts-expect-error`
- [ ] I have not added unnecessary comments (code reads itself)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
